title: THE INK-SHIFT DEBT
logline: In a world where your birthmark is your destiny, a carefree forest-dweller with a 'living' ink stain must hunt down a syndicate of tattoo-thieves to pay off his master's impossible debts.

magic_system.golden_scripts: Permanent geometric birthmarks that glow gold. Represent 'Finished Magic'. Predictable but powerful.
magic_system.living_ink: Tzubaki's messy black Ink-Blot that moves across his skin. Uses Three Hearts to change reality.

flowing_heart.effect: Objects ignore impact, flow around obstacles

ghost_heart.effect: Limbs/objects become weightless shadow, pass through Fixed magic

factions.the_academy: Teaches Golden Script mages. Secretly buying stolen marks from Harvesters for noble children.
factions.the_harvesters: Rogue 'Unmarked' organization. Peel Golden Scripts off living mages. Build Chimera soldiers with grafted marks.
factions.the_hermit: Tzubaki's master. Former Grand Archivist. Stole Source Ink (Tzubaki) to stop Academy experiments.
